subcodes.first_line: O you who yearn for the threshold of that One Beloved! That which you had written, as well as what was latent within your radiant mind
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق آستان آندلبر یکتا آنچه نگاشتی و در ضمیر منیر مضمر داشتی مشهود و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
